calendar.matters:
Petition To Determine Validity Of Purported Trust And To Impose Constructive Trust
Off Calendar Feb-06-2017 Off Calendar

Petition To Determine Validity Of Purported Trust And To Impose Constructive Trust
Off Calendar Nov-07-2016 Continued To Feb-06-17 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Richard Rosenberg for (petitioner) Rosalyne Leon. Edward Koplowitz for (co-trustees) Linda Greer & Bradford Melvin, III.

Mr. Koplowitz reported that discovery is under way, that depositions are being taken, suggests that a status conference date be set for after the first of the year for trial or evidentiary hearing setting. Mr. Rosenberg stated that he is in agreement, that he is not sure they will be ready by January and that he needs to get medical records. The Petition to Determine Validity of Purported Trust and to Impose Constructive Trust was continued to February 6, 2017 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge: Andrew Y.S. Cheng. Clerk: Leslie Gomez. Bailiff: Deputy Rosado. (Not Reported)
